title: malva tricuspidata
intro: Malva tricuspidata, also known as the Chinese mallow or Che Qiao, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malva tricuspidata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory problems. Malva tricuspidata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
